description: Multi-ecosystem medium test. 2 lamps + 2 sensors + 2 plugs against a 35-device catalog spanning yandex (direct wifi/zigbee), aqara (cloud bridge, needs aqara hub), and tuya (cloud bridge wifi, or zigbee needs tuya hub). Rich Pareto front expected: all-yandex-direct (E=1 H=0, expensive), all-aqara-bridge (E=2 H=1, cheap+high quality), tuya-bridge mix (E=2-3 H=0-1, cheap+mid quality). Brute force should take 15-60s depending on hardware (~4M candidate combinations before constraint filtering).
